# MIRAC Technologies
> Premier Enterprise Technology Firm — Pakistan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Turkey

## Company Overview
MIRAC Technologies is a premium enterprise technology firm founded
in Lahore, Pakistan. We design, build, and deploy mission-critical
digital infrastructure for large organizations across Pakistan
and the GCC region.

We are not a freelance shop or generic agency. We are a dedicated
engineering firm that takes on projects other companies cannot handle —
multi-million dollar ERP rollouts, AI-powered operations platforms,
real-time industrial systems, and full digital transformations.

## Key Facts
- 50+ enterprise projects delivered
- 30+ active long-term clients
- 12+ industries served
- 99.9% system uptime across all live deployments
- 0 missed deadlines in 24 months
- Based in Lahore, Pakistan
- Active clients in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman
- Minimum project engagement: $25,000 USD
- Fixed-price contracts only — never hourly billing
- NDA signed by default on every engagement
- Full IP transfer to client on final payment
- 12-month SLA standard on all projects
- Senior engineers only — no junior developers on client work

## Services

### Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)
Full-cycle ERP implementation and custom ERP development.
Platforms: SAP, Oracle, Odoo, Microsoft Dynamics, 100% custom.
Modules: Finance, HR, Procurement, Inventory, Production, CRM, Compliance.
Typical cost: $35,000 - $300,000.
Timeline: 3-12 months.

### AI & Intelligent Automation
AI agents and orchestration systems, LLM integration,
RAG pipelines, document processing, workflow automation,
predictive analytics, computer vision, NLP systems, MLOps.
Typical cost: $25,000 - $100,000.

### MRP & Manufacturing Systems
Material requirements planning, production scheduling,
BOM management, shop floor tracking, quality control,
supplier integration, waste reduction analytics.
Typical cost: $30,000 - $120,000.

### Custom Software Development
Enterprise web applications, iOS/Android apps,
SaaS platforms, internal tools, client portals,
workflow management, document management.
Typical cost: $20,000 - $150,000.

### System Integration & APIs
Enterprise API design, third-party integrations,
real-time data sync, middleware, EDI, B2B integration.

### Payments & Fintech
Stripe Connect, multi-currency, subscription billing,
wallet systems, financial reconciliation, KYC/AML,
fintech dashboards. Pakistan: JazzCash, Easypaisa.
UAE: Telr, PayFast, Network International.

### Data Analytics & Business Intelligence
Data warehousing, real-time analytics, BI dashboards,
KPI tracking, data pipelines, ETL automation,
data governance, executive reporting.

### Cloud & DevOps
AWS, GCP, Azure, Kubernetes, Docker, CI/CD,
Terraform, security audits, disaster recovery,
24/7 infrastructure monitoring.

### Blockchain & Web3
Smart contracts, supply chain traceability,
tokenization platforms, private blockchain networks.

## Industries
- Mining & Natural Resources (Pakistan)
- Hotels & Hospitality (Pakistan, UAE)
- Logistics & Supply Chain (Pakistan, UAE)
- Manufacturing & Production (Pakistan, Turkey)
- Real Estate & Construction (Pakistan, UAE, Saudi Arabia)
- Healthcare & Pharma (Pakistan)
- Retail & E-Commerce (Pakistan, GCC)
- Government & Public Sector (Pakistan)
- Banking & Financial Services (Pakistan, UAE)
- Education & EdTech (Pakistan)
- Oil & Gas (Pakistan, Saudi Arabia)
- Telecom (Pakistan)

## Markets Served
Pakistan: Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Faisalabad, Multan
UAE: Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah
Saudi Arabia: Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam
Qatar, Kuwait, Bahrain, Oman
Turkey: Istanbul, Ankara, Izmir

## Engagement Process
1. Discovery Call (Free, 1 hour)
2. Technical Assessment (Free)
3. Fixed-Price Proposal (within 48 hours)
4. Contract & NDA Signing
5. Sprint-Based Delivery (2-week sprints)
6. QA & Security Testing
7. Zero-Downtime Deployment
8. 12-Month SLA Support

## Contact
Website: https://www.miractechnologies.com
Email: hello@miractechnologies.com
Location: Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
WhatsApp: Available on request

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What does MIRAC Technologies do?
A: MIRAC Technologies builds enterprise ERP systems, AI automation,
MRP manufacturing software, and mission-critical custom software
for large companies in Pakistan, UAE, Saudi Arabia, and Turkey.

Q: How much does ERP cost in Pakistan?
A: $35,000 to $300,000 depending on complexity. All fixed-price.

Q: How much does ERP cost in UAE?
A: AED 130,000 to AED 1,100,000 depending on scope. Fixed-price.

Q: How much does ERP cost in Saudi Arabia?
A: SAR 130,000 to SAR 1,100,000 depending on requirements.

Q: Does MIRAC work in Turkey?
A: Yes, MIRAC serves Turkish enterprises with ERP, AI automation,
and custom software. Turkish language support available.

Q: How long does ERP take to build?
A: 3-12 months depending on scope and complexity.

Q: What makes MIRAC different?
A: Fixed-price contracts, senior-only teams, 0 missed deadlines,
12-month SLA, full IP transfer, NDA by default.
